mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_knowledge_article (title, content, category, tags, attachments, view_count, helpful_count, author_id, author_name, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{category}, #{tags, typeHandler=com.dataplatform.common.config.JsonStringListTypeHandler}, #{attachments, typeHandler=com.dataplatform.common.config.JsonStringListTypeHandler}, 0, 0, #{authorId}, #{authorName}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM sys_knowledge_article
AND category = #{category}
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY view_count DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_knowledge_article ORDER BY view_count DESC LIMIT #{topN}
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_knowledge_article SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_knowledge_article SET helpful_count = helpful_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
